entry.title: Bill 69 (Hawaiʻi County): Adopted → —
entry.content:
PROVIDES FOR THE COST OF PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS IN “IMPROVEMENT DISTRICT NO. 21 – IKI PLACE WATER SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS,” FIXES THE PORTION OF THE COST TO BE ASSESSED AGAINST BENEFITED ASSESSMENT UNITS, ADOPTS A FINAL ASSESSMENT ROLL, IMPOSES AN ASSESSMENT LIEN AGAINST EACH ASSESSMENT UNIT ASSESSED ACCORDING TO THE ASSESSMENT, PROVIDES FOR PAYMENT OF ASSESSMENTS IN INSTALLMENTS, AND AUTHOR

Creates a special fund to be known as “Improvement District No. 21 – Iki Place Water System Improvements Fund,” into which the funds for the Net Project Cost and all money collected by the Director of Finance for assessments levied by this ordinance shall be placed (the total estimated cost of the Net Project Cost in the Improvement District is $275,000).

Status: Adopted → —

Latest action: On agenda 2025-08-06

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 69 (Hawaiʻi County) — Adopted
entry.content:
PROVIDES FOR THE COST OF PUBLIC WATER SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS IN “IMPROVEMENT DISTRICT NO. 21 – IKI PLACE WATER SYSTEM IMPROVEMENTS,” FIXES THE PORTION OF THE COST TO BE ASSESSED AGAINST BENEFITED ASSESSMENT UNITS, ADOPTS A FINAL ASSESSMENT ROLL, IMPOSES AN ASSESSMENT LIEN AGAINST EACH ASSESSMENT UNIT ASSESSED ACCORDING TO THE ASSESSMENT, PROVIDES FOR PAYMENT OF ASSESSMENTS IN INSTALLMENTS, AND AUTHOR

Creates a special fund to be known as “Improvement District No. 21 – Iki Place Water System Improvements Fund,” into which the funds for the Net Project Cost and all money collected by the Director of Finance for assessments levied by this ordinance shall be placed (the total estimated cost of the Net Project Cost in the Improvement District is $275,000).

Latest action: Council: Bill 69 passes second & final reading - 08/06/25

View on the council site
